title: boykinia elata
intro: Boykinia elata, also known as creeping saxifrage, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Boykinia elata can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
